preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.lede: Tell us how and when you prefer to meet. These are administrative preferences for matching, not clinical recommendations.
preferences.periodsHint: Select all that work for you.
preferences.maxPriceHint: An estimate is fine. This helps with administrative matching only.

supportNeeds.title: Support needs
supportNeeds.lede: Share a general reason and a short description. MindMesh does not diagnose and does not replace professional care.
supportNeeds.description: Describe what you are looking for
supportNeeds.descriptionHint: Free text for administrative matching. Avoid sharing information you would not want stored in a demo.

review.title: Review
review.lede: Confirm your information before submitting. You can return to any step to make changes.
review.consentLabel: I understand this is a fictional demo for administrative intake and matching. Matching results are suggestions, not clinical recommendations. I consent to submit this information for the demo.

status.successBody: Your administrative intake was received for this demo (reference {{id}}). A coordinator would review matching suggestions next. Matching results are suggestions, not clinical recommendations.
status.successBodyNoId: Your administrative intake was received for this demo. A coordinator would review matching suggestions next. Matching results are suggestions, not clinical recommendations.
status.failed: Unable to submit intake. Please try again.

validation.preferredPeriodsMin: Select at least one preferred period.
validation.maxPriceRequired: Enter an approximate maximum session price.
validation.maxPricePositive: Price must be greater than zero.
validation.maxPriceMax: Enter a maximum of 2000 for this demo.
validation.reasonRequired: Select a general reason for seeking support.
validation.descriptionMin: Please share at least 20 characters so we can understand your needs.
validation.descriptionMax: Please keep the description under 2000 characters.
